name: Cut it!
short_description: Cut It! – Slice Your Way to Victory!
detailed_description:
Cut It! – Slice Your Way to Victory!

Get ready to wield a blade like never before in Cut It!—a thrilling physics-based game where your cutting skills determine the fate of others! Obstacles are blocking the paths ahead, and it's up to you to clear the way with your sharp instincts and even sharper weapons.

With a special knife that adapts to any situation—whether as a humble kitchen tool or a mighty katana—you’ll slice, chop, and carve through anything standing in your way. Precision and timing are key as you decide how and when to strike. Are you ready to do a good deed with a deadly edge?

🔪 Game Features:

  • A morphing knife that changes size and form to match the challenge

  • Dynamic obstacles blocking the way—slice through them to clear paths

  • Physics-based cutting mechanics that reward skillful slicing

  • Simple and intuitive controls—just use your mouse to slash through the chaos

Step up, grab your blade, and cut your way to success in Cut It!
